texto: But the interesting cases are those where the conflict remains obstinately in place however much we ponder the problem. These are the cases where we are tempted to conclude that "intuition cannot be trusted." In these situations we need to improve our intuition, to debug it, but the pressure on us is to abandon intuition and rely on equations instead.
explicacao: Citação de Seymour Papert sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “But the interesting cases are those where the conflict remains obstinately in place however much …” articula desenvolvimento-pessoal, debugging, intuition em registro de desenvolvimento pessoal, com relevância para contextos como intuition.

frase_original: But the interesting cases are those where the conflict remains obstinately in place however much we ponder the problem. These are the cases where we are tempted to conclude that "intuition cannot be trusted." In these situations we need to improve our intuition, to debug it, but the pressure on us is to abandon intuition and rely on equations instead.

texto: Every maker of video games knows something that the makers of curriculum don't seem to understand. You'll never see a video game being advertised as being easy. Kids who do not like school will tell you it's not because it's too hard. It's because it's--boring
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Seymour Papert: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Every maker of video games knows something that the makers of curriculum don't seem to understand…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, education, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
